response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ development on Windows platforms and has no visible experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both of which are mandatory for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to an early academic project and NI LabWindows, which is not equivalent to the required financial systems development context.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong DevOps and CI/CD background with Docker, GitLab, and deployment systems
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows in financial systems
Zero mention of SQL Server, Oracle, or fixed income/derivatives domain experience
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not aligned with C++/Windows financial systems
